'''Pohtarza''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[t'landa Til]] who was the Head [[Sacredot]] of [[Colony Five]] on the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]-controlled [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. While he was officiating over a ceremony of [[Exultation]], Pohtarza was assassinated by an [[Aar'aa]] on the payroll of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] just prior to the [[Battle of Ylesia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
